title: Port internal API tests from upstream (parser, node, tree)
description: Implement Section 3 of testing-strategy.md. Port test cases from tree-sitter's parser_test.rs, node_test.rs, and tree_test.rs to Go. Focus on: basic parsing, error recovery behavior, included ranges, node traversal (child/sibling/parent), byte/point positions, S-expression output, tree editing, changed ranges. Use hand-compiled JSON/Go grammars as test languages.
